title: Latches on conditions optimized as X upon multiple conditions

features.name: always_ff with mutually exclusive if-else if assignments
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block with async reset where a signal is assigned under mutually exclusive conditions in an if-else if chain
features.snippet:
always_ff @(posedge i_clk or negedge i_rst_n) begin
    if (~i_rst_n) begin o_signal <= 0; end
    else if (i_force) begin o_signal <= 0; end
    else if (i_valid) begin o_signal <= o_signal + 1; end
end

features.name: signal assigned under multiple exclusive conditions
features.description: Code should include a signal that is assigned different values under mutually exclusive conditions where one branch increments the signal and another resets it
features.snippet:
if (i_force) begin o_signal <= 0; end
else if (i_valid) begin o_signal <= o_signal + 1; end

features.name: ternary operator workaround for mux tree issue
features.description: Code should include a workaround using a ternary operator inside a combined condition to avoid the X inference bug with exclusive conditions
